security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://localhost:7331; img-src 'self' data:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.longDescription: Apohara — natural-language objective → swarm of LLM agents → merged code, visually, interactively. The multi-provider orchestrator with verification mesh, deterministic replay, and AMD MI300X local-first path via Apohara Context Forge.
